title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: October 6, 2022
summary: October 6, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase by a greater rate from last week of 8.90% , from the level on 09/29/2022 of 5.128 M km 2 to 5.629 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources Laborat...

title: Sitnasuak Native Corporation Launches “Throughout Generations” Photo Submission
summary: As we reflect back on the generations before us, we are reminded of our history and the teachings of our elders.
